title: Hanuman Chalisa
desc: Devotees come together to recite the Hanuman Chalisa, a Hindu hymn in praise of Lord Hanuman, as they seek his blessings.

title: Sai Baba Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of soul-stirring devotional songs and hymns sung in praise of Sai Baba of Shirdi by various musical artists is played back to back.

title: Durgai Abhisekam
desc: Hindu priests perform sacred ceremonial rituals while offering prayers and worship to Goddess Durga to seek divine blessings for a fulfilled life.

title: Palani Murugan
desc: Hindu religious leaders and devotees participate in sacred rituals while chanting holy hymns to seek blessings from Lord Murugan.

title: Lakshmi Arul
desc: A religious leader delivers an insightful discourse on the divine grace and blessings bestowed by Goddess Lakshmi and urges followers to a lead righteous life.

title: Baradwaj Swamigal
desc: Baradwaj Swamigal delivers a discourse based on the sacred scriptures and urges the devotees to follow the path of righteousness.

title: Vishnu Sahasranamam
desc: Hindu religious leaders and devotees chant a Sanskrit hymn listing the 1,000 names of Lord Vishnu to seek his divine blessings.

title: Lalitha Sahasranamam
desc: Religious leaders recite a sacred hymn containing the thousand names of Goddess Lalita, a revered Hindu deity, as an act of worship and devotion.

title: Dhup Aarti
desc: Hindu priests worship and venerate the idol of Sai Baba of Shirdi along with the devotees who perform prayers to the god.

title: Kantha Sasti Kavasam
desc: A melodious rendering of a hymn composed in praise of Lord Murugan is played in order to invoke the spirit of devotion.

title: Bagavatham
desc: A religious scholar delivers a discourse based on the sacred scriptures and urges the devotees to follow the path of righteousness.

title: Indrakshi kavasam
desc: A melodious rendition of 'Indrakshi Kavacham', a devotional hymn in honour of Goddess Durga in her form as Indrakshi, is played.

title: Sri Sai Satcharitra
desc: The narrator recounts verses from the Sri Sai Satcharitra, which consists of the miracles and numerous stories of Sai Baba.

title: Bhaghavat Geethai
desc: A religious leader delivers an insightful discourse on verses from the Bhagavad Gita, a revered Hindu scripture, and urges devotees to live a righteous life.

title: Night Aarti
desc: Devotees of Lord Ganesha participate in a prayer ceremony to worship the elephant-headed god led by a religious leader.
